  "findings": [
    "Outriggers are not fully extended on mats as required by the manufacturer load charts and safety standards."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all crane operations.",
    "Fully extend all outriggers and properly position them on structural mats/pads in accordance with the crane's load chart specifications before resuming lifts."
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a crane without fully extending the outriggers on proper mats violates OSHA 1926.1402 and 1926.1404 requirements, invalidates the standard load charts, and introduces a critical risk of crane tip-over or structural failure.",

  ]
